assessment.note: He doubts that his current work is the kind that gets recognized, which signals mild negative growth trajectory; also reveals a clarity/recognition concern worth noting.

new_queue.label: Recognized work
new_queue.name: What kind of work do you think gets recognized here?
new_queue.description: Clarifies his model of what the organisation values so the underlying mismatch is more concrete.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by moving toward concrete support or adjustments without opening a new thread.
